verdict_reasoning: IZUMO1 is a single-pass transmembrane protein of the IZUMO/Ig-like cell adhesion molecule family expressed exclusively on mature sperm cells. It is essential for sperm-egg fusion, functioning as a surface-displayed protein on the outer leaflet of the sperm plasma membrane where it binds its oocyte receptor JUNO. However, expression and surface display are restricted to a narrow germline/reproductive lineage (mature sperm), qualifying as tissue_restricted_surface rather than broad constitutive surface display.
